title: XO SMP Modpack
description:
Created for the XO SMP Server

Providing all resources needed AND lot's of optimization to ensure smooth gameplay!!!!
body:
A modpack for the XO Mafia to play like FuzeXO! 

Enjoy HUGE optimization to enjoy the game on any setup with amazing fps!

Enjoy mods that will bring your game to LIFE! These mods will make you feel like youre in a movie! Highly realistic and QoL!
